summary.headline: Bunge extends expiration date of exchange offers and consent solicitations for Viterra notes.
summary.narrative_summary: Bunge's wholly-owned subsidiary, Bunge Limited Finance Corp., extended the expiration date of its previously announced exchange offers and related consents for Viterra notes until October 31, 2024.

ma_or_capital_allocation.description: Extension of the expiration date for exchange offers and consent solicitations related to Viterra notes.

extraction_notes: Numbers and dates are inferred from the filing text; no specific financial metrics were provided.
